info.title: RadioShaq API
info.description: Strategic Autonomous Ham Radio and Knowledge Operations Dispatch System

get.description: Readiness probe: DB (if configured), orchestrator, optional audio agent.

post.description: Create an access token (e.g. for field station).

schema.title: Response Create Token Auth Token Post

post.description: Exchange refresh token for new access token.

schema.title: Response Refresh Token Auth Refresh Post

get.description: Return current token claims (requires Bearer token).
Get propagation prediction between two points.

post.description: Send arbitrary text as TTS over the radio (audio out).

schema.title: Response Send Tts Radio Send Tts Post

post.description:
Submit a message for REACT orchestration.
Requires orchestrator to be set in app state (lifespan).
Optional body fields: channel, chat_id, sender_id (InboundMessage shape for routing).

schema.title: Response Process Message Messages Process Post

post.description:
Whitelist entry point: request access to gated services (e.g. messaging between bands).
Text or audio → orchestrator evaluates → response as text and optionally TTS.
Accepts application/json: { "text" or "message", "callsign?", "send_audio_back?" }
or multipart/form-data: file (audio), callsign, send_audio_back.

Approved/message can come from either the orchestrator final message (tool path:
LLM used register_callsign tool and replied) or a completed whitelist agent task
(agent path: ACTING ran the whitelist agent; result in completed_tasks).

schema.title: Response Whitelist Request Messages Whitelist Request Post

post.description: Upload audio; run ASR; whitelist check; store transcript. Optionally inject to RX queue.

schema.title: Response Message From Audio Messages From Audio Post

post.description: Inject message into RX queue and store to DB (whitelist enforced).

schema.title: Response Inject And Store Messages Inject And Store Post

post.description:
Translate a message from one band to another and store both sides.

Scenario: User A emits on band A (e.g. 40m), message is received and stored;
then it is "relayed" to band B (e.g. 2m) for User B. Stores:
1. Original (or reference) transcript on source band
2. Relay transcript on target band with metadata linking to source

Body:
- message (str): Text to relay
- source_band (str): e.g. "40m"
- source_frequency_hz (float, optional): exact freq if known
- source_callsign (str): who sent on source band
- target_band (str): e.g. "2m"
- target_frequency_hz (float, optional): target freq; else use band default
- destination_callsign (str, optional): who receives on target band
- session_id (str, optional): default generated

schema.title: Response Relay Message Between Bands Messages Relay Post

get.description:
Search transcripts (received/relayed messages). Use for demo so User 2 can poll
for messages on a band or for their callsign (e.g. after relay from 40m to 2m).
When whitelist is configured, only transcripts whose source/destination is in the whitelist are returned.

parameters.name: callsign

schema.description: Filter by source or destination callsign
schema.title: Callsign

parameters.description: Filter by source or destination callsign

parameters.name: band

schema.description: Filter by band name (e.g. 40m, 2m); uses extra_data.band
schema.title: Band

parameters.description: Filter by band name (e.g. 40m, 2m); uses extra_data.band

get.description: Get a single transcript by id (for play or display).

schema.title: Response Get Transcript Transcripts  Transcript Id  Get

post.description: Load transcript, generate TTS, and send over radio (audio out).

schema.title: Response Play Transcript Over Radio Transcripts  Transcript Id  Play Post

post.description: Register a callsign so it is automatically accepted for store/relay.

schema.title: Response Register Callsign Callsigns Register Post

post.description: Upload audio; run ASR and register the extracted or confirmed callsign.

schema.title: Response Register From Audio Callsigns Register From Audio Post

delete.description: Remove a callsign from the registry.

schema.title: Response Unregister Callsign Callsigns Registered  Callsign  Delete

post.description:
Inject a message into the RX path for demo/testing.

The message will be available to receivers (radio_rx / digital_modes)
when they poll the injection queue. Use for:
- User injection script (e.g. audio → text → this endpoint)
- Simulating one user emitting on a band for another to receive

schema.title: Response Inject Message Inject Message Post

post.description:
Accept an inbound message (e.g. from Lambda) and publish to MessageBus.
Body: channel, sender_id, chat_id, content; optional media, metadata, session_key_override.
Orchestrator consumer must be running elsewhere to process (e.g. run_inbound_consumer).

schema.title: Response Publish Inbound Internal Bus Inbound Post

get.description: Get current audio configuration (env/file + optional runtime overrides).

schema.title: Response Get Audio Config Api V1 Config Audio Get

patch.description: Update audio configuration (runtime overlay only; does not persist to file).

schema.title: Response Update Audio Config Api V1 Config Audio Patch
Response Reset Audio Config Api V1 Config Audio Reset Post

get.description: List available audio input/output devices (requires voice_rx).

schema.title: Response List Audio Devices Api V1 Audio Devices Get

post.description: Test an audio device by ID (placeholder).

schema.title: Response Test Audio Device Api V1 Audio Devices  Device Id  Test Post

get.description: List pending responses awaiting human confirmation.

schema.title: Response List Pending Responses Api V1 Audio Pending Get

post.description: Approve a pending response (send it over the radio).

schema.title: Response Approve Pending Response Api V1 Audio Pending  Pending Id  Approve Post
Response Reject Pending Response Api V1 Audio Pending  Pending Id  Reject Post

text.title: Text
text.description: Message text to inject as received

audio_path.title: Audio Path
audio_path.description: Optional path to audio file (stored with transcript)

InjectMessageBody.title: InjectMessageBody
InjectMessageBody.description: Body for POST /inject/message (user injection for demo).
